evidence_title: Special Education • Classes - PRINGLE-MORSE CONSOLIDATED INDEPENDENT SCHOOL DISTRICT
evidence_headings: The Learning Center of Pringle-Morse is dedicated to providing a comprehensive educational program for all students with Title I, 504, or Special Education needs. Pringle-Morse is a Comprehensive Title I school and may provide assistance to students with any academic needs. Therefore, a wide variety of research based program options are offered through the Learning Center's staff, through school counselors, through nursing staff, through referral, or in the student's own classroom. Because the student's classroom is considered the most effective place for students to learn, the Pringle-Morse Learning Center staff is also committed to providing highly qualified support and resources for classroom teachers who serve children with additional academic needs.
**Parents and guardians of children with academic needs can access resources that are FREE and are recommended by the District for all parents and guardians.
